properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 V3 V4 C5 V6 V7 V4 C8 C9 C8 V10 V11 V1 C8 C9 C8

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Let everything That has breath Praise the Lord, Praise the Lord.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: I'll praise in the valley, Praise on the mountain. I'll praise when I'm sure, Praise when I'm doubting.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I'll praise when outnumbered, Praise when surrounded. 'Cause praise is the water, My enemies drown in.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: As long as I'm breathing, I've got a reason to:

verse.name: C5
verse.lines: Praise the Lord Oh, my soul! Praise the Lord Oh, my soul!

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: I'll praise when I feel it, And I'll praise when I don't. I'll praise 'cause I know You're still in control.

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: 'Cause my praise is a weapon, It's more than a sound. Oh, my praise is the shout, That brings Jericho down.

verse.name: C8
verse.lines: Praise the Lord, Oh, my soul! Praise the Lord Oh, my soul!

verse.name: C9
verse.lines: I won't be quiet My God is alive So how could I keep it inside?

verse.name: V10
verse.lines: I'll praise 'cause You're sovereign, Praise 'cause You reign, Praise 'cause You rose and defeated the grave.

verse.name: V11
verse.lines: I'll praise 'cause You're faithful, Praise 'cause You're true, Praise 'cause there's nobody greater than You.
